dvids.title: CENTCOM Disables Non-Compliant Vessel in Gulf of Oman
dvids.desc: TAMPA, Fla. — At 11:14 p.m. on June 9, U.S. forces disabled an oil tanker in the Gulf of Oman for the second consecutive day after another vessel violated the ongoing blockade by attempting to transport oil from Iran.

dvids.title: CENTCOM Disables Non-Compliant Vessel in Gulf of Oman
dvids.desc: U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) disables Palau-flagged M/T Settebello as it transits the Gulf of Oman, June 9, 2026. (U.S. Central Command Video)

dvids.title: U.S. Completes Strikes in Response to Iran’s Attack on Apache
dvids.desc: TAMPA, Fla. — U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) forces completed self-defense strikes against Iran, June 9, at the Commander in Chief’s direction in response to yesterday’s downing of a U.S. Army Apache helicopter.

dvids.title: U.S. Army Crew Safely Rescued After Helicopter Lost at Sea
dvids.desc: TAMPA, Fla. — At 7:33 p.m. ET on June 8, two crew members from a U.S. Army AH-64 Apache were rescued by American forces after their helicopter went down near the coast of Oman while patrolling regional waters.
